mnemonics.title: Pointer Basics
mnemonics.content: P.A.S. - Pointer Allocates Space. Remember: 'Pointers Are Special' variables that hold memory addresses.

mnemonics.title: MCRF - The Four Memory Functions
mnemonics.content: M - Malloc (allocate uninitialized memory), C - Calloc (allocate and Clear/zero-initialize), R - Realloc (Resize existing allocation), F - Free (release allocated memory). Remember: 'Memory Can be Resized and Freed'.

mnemonics.title: Pointer Arithmetic Scaling
mnemonics.content: S.P.A.C.E. - Scale Pointer Arithmetic Correctly Everytime. When adding n to a pointer, always multiply n by sizeof(type) to get the actual byte offset.
